name: claw-vscode
description: Claw coding agent Chat participant for openvscode-server

claw.projId.description: Active project id (required for @claw). Authoritative value is written by Gateway into proj_N/home/.vscode/settings.json (see GET /v1/projects/{id}/ovs/workspace).

claw.agentWsBase.description: WebSocket base for agent bridge (browser via Playground /ovs/agent/ws). Empty = auto (Remote EH uses gatewayHost).

claw.gatewayHost.description: Gateway host:port for Remote EH direct agent WS (no Playground cookie)

claw.gatewayPublicHost.description: Gateway host:port reachable from the browser when OVS is opened on :13000 (agent WS)

claw.playgroundPort.description: Playground listen port; when location.port matches, use /ovs/agent/ws proxy
